thread.title: Social Media Corner 22nd November 2024

author: @narendramodi
title: Social Media Corner 22nd November 2024
text:
PM Modi's Visionary Leadership: A Guiding Light for the Global South
PM
— SIDDHANT GAUTAM (@Siddhant911g)[@narendramodi]Ji’s visionary leadership continues to shine on the global stage! In just 5 days, he received 4 prestigious honors, reinforcing his role as the trusted voice of the Global South. India’s respect under his guidance are truly remarkable! 🇮🇳[https://t.co/H2STBhL0x9][November 22, 2024]
Wow👏
— 🇮🇳 Sangitha Varier 🚩 (@VarierSangitha)
Hon[#PM][@narendramodi]Ji’s Govt’s digital verification drive has successfully weeded out 5.8cr fake ration cards!
With 99.8% of beneficiaries now digitally verified,the system has become secure,transparent& has set a global benchmark for efficient food security initiatives.[pic.twitter.com/XgUn5aL7WM][November 22, 2024]
Transforming governance with a Digital Revolution!
— Siddaram 🇮🇳 (@Siddaram_Sg)
PM Shri[@narendramodi]ji's government has eliminated 5.8 crore fake ration cards through digital verification, ensuring that welfare funds directly benefit the needy.
A remarkable step towards transparency & efficiency![pic.twitter.com/iVgmjOxumM][November 22, 2024]
— shruti verma (@vshruti58)
[#I4C], in partnership with DoT, has effectively blocked 17,000 WhatsApp accounts linked to cybercriminals from Southeast Asia. This effort strengthens India's[#DigitalSecurity]by disrupting offshore crime networks.
Kudos to the team![@narendramodi]👏👏[pic.twitter.com/1tvqrnp68b][November 22, 2024]
A leader par excellance, known n liked d world over is none other than our PM Modi..So far, 19 Nations have conferred their highest State honour, on PM Modi. He has addressed many Parliaments, in d world. Congrats n proud of you Sir.!
— Rukmani Varma 🇮🇳 (@pointponder)[#ModiHaiThoMumkinHai][pic.twitter.com/wFBXxOiIrm][November 22, 2024]
Under PM
— Harshit (@Harshit80048226)[@narendramodi]Ji's leadership, India truly embraces the mantra of 'Every Nation Matters. Time and again,India has stepped up as a First Responder during global crises, showcasing unwavering commitment to humanity Thank you,Sir, for guiding us with compassion and vision![pic.twitter.com/D0Yp8sXvVU][November 22, 2024]
मोदी सरकार ग्रामीण भारत में हर गरीब के लिए पक्की छत और सम्मानपूर्ण जीवन सुनिश्चित कर रही है। 🏠✨
— Nial Vidyarthi (@NialVidyarthi)
UPA (2004-14) के मुकाबले, NDA सरकार ने ग्रामीण आवासों के लिए केंद्रीय निधि में अभूतपूर्व वृद्धि की है।
धन्यवाद PM[@narendramodi]जी, समावेशी विकास के इस दृष्टिकोण के लिए! 🙏[pic.twitter.com/HW5D0wbOYK][November 22, 2024]
'PLI Scheme: Transforming India's manufacturing sector into a global powerhouse'
— दिनेश चावला (@iDineshChawlaa)
The scheme has started to show significant benefits as the scheme has generated revenue 19 times the amount allocated to it.
Kudos team[@narendramodi]
👏👏[https://t.co/mRC5SQaeU8][pic.twitter.com/rbLFG2LZBm][November 22, 2024]
Kudos to PM
— Aditya Sethi (@BIKASHC85165894)[@narendramodi]for driving India's digital revolution! Our country's digital public infrastructure is a shining example of innovation & competition, thanks to his visionary leadership[#DigitalIndia][#Innovation][https://t.co/HmIGLDCFWr][November 22, 2024]
— Zahid Patka (Modi Ka Parivar) (@zahidpatka)
[#GoGreen]
Thanks PM[@narendramodi]Ji
Indian Railways is set to achieve significant milestone in its journey toward sustainability with the launch of its first
hydrogen-powered train trials in December 2024 on the Jind-Sonipat route to achieve net-zero carbon emissions[@PMOIndia][pic.twitter.com/Nqfg9yz4ds][November 22, 2024]
